dialogs.script:
say: You already have a starter, {player}!
say: Take good care of it!

showimage: pokemon/bulbasaur
say: Bulbasaur!
say: The Seed Pokemon. A Grass and Poison type.
say: A great choice for a beginner!
choice: Do you want to choose Bulbasaur?
hideimage
givepokemon: bulbasaur 5
setflag: pokemon_chosen
setflag: starter_is_bulbasaur
clearflag: starter_is_charmander
clearflag: starter_is_squirtle
say: Bulbasaur was added to your party!
say: Take good care of it, {player}!
hidenpc
